MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to explain why he/she failed to appear and failed to file the final Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is June 1, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.
